ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., Company, Financial Institution, Government) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the entity operates in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the entity is registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration of the entity */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the entity */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the entity */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the entity */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the entity */,
  "rating_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary rating agency for the entity */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the entity's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being rated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating type */,
  "long_term_rating" TEXT /* Long-term credit rating */,
  "short_term_rating" TEXT /* Short-term credit rating */,
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outlook */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating action */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated rating report */,
  "rating_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating agency */,
  "rating_score" REAL /* Numerical score for the rating */,
  "rating_justification" TEXT /* Brief justification for the rating */,
  "rating_methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to determine the rating */,
  "rating_validity_period" TEXT /* Period for which the rating is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_rating_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_type_id") REFERENCES rating_types ("rating_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_outlook_id FOREIGN KEY ("outlook_id") REFERENCES outlooks ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES rating_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES rating_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating report */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating associated with the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the rating report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the rating report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the rating report file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report */,
  "report_author" TEXT /* Author of the report */,
  "report_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search */,
  "report_language" TEXT /* Language of the report */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_reports_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "press_releases" (
  "press_release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each press release */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating associated with the press release */,
  "release_title" TEXT /* Title of the press release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the press release */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the press release */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the press release file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the press release was uploaded */,
  "release_summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the press release */,
  "release_author" TEXT /* Author of the press release */,
  "release_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for easy search */,
  "release_language" TEXT /* Language of the press release */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version of the press release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("press_release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_press_releases_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating history entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being rated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the rating change */,
  "previous_long_term_rating" TEXT /* Previous long-term credit rating */,
  "new_long_term_rating" TEXT /* New long-term credit rating */,
  "previous_short_term_rating" TEXT /* Previous short-term credit rating */,
  "new_short_term_rating" TEXT /* New short-term credit rating */,
  "previous_outlook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the previous outlook */,
  "new_outlook_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new outlook */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating action */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated rating report */,
  "rating_agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating agency */,
  "justification_for_change" TEXT /* Brief justification for the rating change */,
  "methodology_used" TEXT /* Methodology used for the rating change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES rating_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES rating_actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_new_outlook_id FOREIGN KEY ("new_outlook_id") REFERENCES outlooks ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_previous_outlook_id FOREIGN KEY ("previous_outlook_id") REFERENCES outlooks ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rating_history_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_types" (
  "rating_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating type */,
  "rating_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating type (e.g., Entity, Sovereign) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rating_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the rating action (e.g., Initial, Reaffirmed, Upgraded, Downgraded) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rating action */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating action is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outlooks" (
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outlook */,
  "outlook_name" TEXT /* Name of the outlook (e.g., Stable, Positive, Negative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outlook */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the outlook is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, compliance officer, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rating being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the rating or report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating or report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to access the system */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES rating_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_rating_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_id") REFERENCES ratings ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
